nodes.label: geo/models.py
nodes.description: Geospatial data models: Country (ISO countries with MultiPolygon geometry) and Region (provinces with PostGIS geometry, game map fields, neighbors, sea distances, buildings/capital data)

nodes.label: Country
nodes.description: Django model for countries with UUID PK, name, ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code, and MultiPolygon geometry (SRID 4326)

nodes.label: Region
nodes.description: Django model for map regions/provinces with PostGIS geometry, game-coordinate polygon data, centroid, neighbors (M2M self), tiles, buildings, capital data, sea distances, coastal flag, and population weight

nodes.label: geo/views.py
nodes.description: Geo API controller providing endpoints for countries, regions (GeoJSON), region shapes (pixel-space for Pixi.js), MVT vector tiles, and neighbor graph. Uses PostGIS spatial queries and Redis caching.

nodes.label: GeoController
nodes.description: API controller (/geo/) with endpoints: list_countries, regions_graph, region_shapes (game coords to pixel space), get_tile (MVT vector tiles via PostGIS), list_regions (GeoJSON), get_region. All public (no auth).

nodes.label: GeoController.region_shapes
nodes.description: Returns region polygons in normalized pixel space for Pixi.js rendering. Maps game coordinates to canvas using texture-aligned bounds (27x16 chunk grid). Includes world_texture rect for chunk placement. Cached 24h.

nodes.label: GeoController.get_tile
nodes.description: Serves MVT (Mapbox Vector Tiles) via raw PostGIS SQL (ST_AsMVT/ST_AsMVTGeom). Supports match-specific country filtering. Cached 24h in Redis.

nodes.label: geo/schemas.py
nodes.description: Pydantic schemas for geo API: CountryOutSchema, RegionOutSchema (with centroid lat/lng resolvers), RegionPixelShape, PixelBounds, RegionShapesOutSchema, GeoJSON feature schemas

nodes.label: import_geo.py
nodes.description: Django management command to import Natural Earth countries and regions (admin level 1) from GeoJSON URLs. Calculates region neighbors via PostGIS ST_Touches.

nodes.label: import_provinces_v2.py
nodes.description: Django management command to import game provinces from provinces_source_v2.json. Converts game pixel coordinates to WGS-84, builds PostGIS MultiPolygons, sets neighbor relationships and sea distance bands.

nodes.label: internal_auth.py
nodes.description: Utility function check_internal_secret() that verifies X-Internal-Secret header for securing internal API endpoints between Rust gateway and Django

nodes.label: check_internal_secret
nodes.description: Verifies X-Internal-Secret header matches configured INTERNAL_SECRET setting. Used by all /api/internal/ endpoints.

nodes.label: inventory/models.py
nodes.description: Inventory system models: ItemCategory, Item (with rarity, types: material/blueprint/boost/crate/key/cosmetic), UserInventory (stackable stacks), ItemDrop, Wallet (gold), Deck, DeckItem, ItemInstance (CS2-style unique items with wear/pattern/StatTrak), EquippedCosmetic, CosmeticSlot choices

nodes.label: Item
nodes.description: Core item definition model with rarity (common-legendary), item types (material, blueprint_building/unit, tactical_package, boost, crate, key, cosmetic), crate loot tables, boost params, blueprint refs, cosmetic slots/assets

nodes.label: ItemInstance
nodes.description: CS2-style unique item instance with pattern_seed (0-999), wear (0.0-1.0 mapped to Factory New through Battle-Scarred), StatTrak counters (matches/kills/units), nametag, provenance tracking (first_owner, crafted_by, dropped_from_match)

nodes.label: Wallet
nodes.description: Persistent gold wallet (OneToOne with User). Tracks gold balance, total_earned, total_spent.

nodes.label: Deck
nodes.description: Pre-match loadout of items (blueprints, boosts, ability scrolls). Has is_default flag with unique enforcement in save().

nodes.label: EquippedCosmetic
nodes.description: Tracks equipped cosmetic per user per slot. Unique constraint on (user, slot).

nodes.label: CosmeticSlot
nodes.description: TextChoices enum defining all cosmetic slots: unit skins, building skins, VFX (attack/move/nuke/capture/defend/elimination/victory), ability skins, profile (emblem/frame/title/flag), audio (sound/music)

nodes.label: inventory/views.py
nodes.description: Inventory API controllers: InventoryController (/inventory/) for items, inventory, wallet, drops, crate opening, cosmetics; DeckController (/inventory/decks/) for deck CRUD with validation. Helper functions: add_item_to_inventory, remove_item_from_inventory, create_item_instance.

nodes.label: InventoryController
nodes.description: API controller (/inventory/) with endpoints: list_items, my_inventory (unified stacks+instances), get_instance, rename_instance, my_wallet, my_drops, open_crate, equipped_cosmetics, equip_cosmetic, unequip_cosmetic. Module-gated by 'inventory'.

nodes.label: DeckController
nodes.description: API controller (/inventory/decks/) with endpoints: list_decks, create_deck, get_deck, update_deck (with item type/quantity/blueprint_ref validation), delete_deck, set_default_deck. Module-gated by 'cosmetics'.

nodes.label: add_item_to_inventory
nodes.description: Adds items to user inventory. Stackable: increments UserInventory.quantity. Non-stackable: creates ItemInstance(s) with random pattern/wear/StatTrak.

nodes.label: remove_item_from_inventory
nodes.description: Removes items from user inventory. Stackable: decrements quantity. Non-stackable: deletes oldest instances.

nodes.label: create_item_instance
nodes.description: Creates a new unique ItemInstance with random pattern_seed (0-999), wear (range varies by rarity), and StatTrak chance (varies by rarity).

nodes.label: inventory/schemas.py
nodes.description: Pydantic schemas for inventory API: ItemOutSchema, ItemInstanceOutSchema (with wear_condition/is_rare_pattern resolvers), ItemCategoryOutSchema, InventoryItemOutSchema, WalletOutSchema, ItemDropOutSchema, DeckOutSchema, EquippedCosmeticOutSchema, input schemas for crate/deck/cosmetic operations

nodes.label: inventory/tasks.py
nodes.description: Post-match item drop generation. Winners get 80 gold + 4-7 drops, losers get 35 gold + 2-4 drops. Drops weighted: 70% materials (qty 2-4), 20% equipment (qty 1), 10% any. Rarity weights favor winners. Celery task wrapper.

nodes.label: generate_match_drops
nodes.description: Generates item drops and gold rewards for all human players after a match. Called from finalize_match_results_sync. Uses weighted rarity rolls across material/equipment/other pools.

nodes.label: inventory/admin.py
nodes.description: Django admin registration for all inventory models with Unfold-based ModelAdmin classes, tabular inlines, display decorators, and filters

nodes.label: marketplace/models.py
nodes.description: Marketplace models: MarketListing (buy/sell orders with status, expiry, bot flag, instance support), MarketTransaction (trade records with fee), MarketConfig (singleton with fee %, duration, limits, bot restock config)

nodes.label: MarketListing
nodes.description: Buy or sell order on the marketplace. Has listing_type (sell/buy), status (active/fulfilled/cancelled/expired), price_per_unit, quantity_remaining, expiry, bot_listing flag, optional ItemInstance FK.

nodes.label: MarketTransaction
nodes.description: Record of a completed marketplace trade. Tracks buyer, seller, item, quantity, price, fee (gold sink).

nodes.label: MarketConfig
nodes.description: Singleton marketplace config with transaction_fee_percent, listing_duration_hours, max_active_listings_per_user, bot restock settings. Uses fixed UUID PK.

nodes.label: marketplace/views.py
nodes.description: Marketplace API controller (/marketplace/) with endpoints: get_config, list_active listings, my_listings, history, create_listing (sell/buy with escrow), buy_from_listing (with fee calculation and atomic gold transfer), cancel_listing (return items/gold). Module-gated.

nodes.label: MarketplaceController
nodes.description: API controller handling marketplace operations. Sell orders escrow items, buy orders escrow gold. Transactions use select_for_update for concurrency safety. Fee calculated from MarketConfig.

nodes.label: marketplace/tasks.py
nodes.description: Celery tasks: bot_restock_marketplace (ensures 3 sell listings per tradeable item from MarketBot with price variance), expire_old_listings (returns items/gold to sellers on expiry)

nodes.label: marketplace/schemas.py
nodes.description: Pydantic schemas for marketplace: MarketListingOutSchema, CreateListingInSchema, BuyFromListingInSchema, MarketTransactionOutSchema, MarketConfigOutSchema

nodes.label: matchmaking/models.py
nodes.description: Matchmaking models: Match (status workflow: waiting->selecting->in_progress->finished/cancelled, game_mode, map_config, settings_snapshot), MatchPlayer (color, alive status, capital_region, deck/cosmetic snapshots), MatchQueue, Lobby (with status flow), LobbyPlayer

nodes.label: Match
nodes.description: Core match model with status (waiting/selecting/in_progress/finished/cancelled), FK to GameMode and MapConfig, winner, settings_snapshot JSON, is_tutorial flag, timestamps

nodes.label: MatchPlayer
nodes.description: Player in a match. Tracks color, is_alive, capital_region FK, deck_snapshot (consumed items), cosmetic_snapshot (frozen asset URLs), eliminated_at

nodes.label: Lobby
nodes.description: Pre-match lobby with status (waiting/full/ready/starting/cancelled), host_user, max_players, optional Match FK, full_at for ready timeout tracking

nodes.label: MatchQueue
nodes.description: Matchmaking queue entry (OneToOne with User). Tracks game_mode and join time.

nodes.label: matchmaking/views.py
nodes.description: Match and Tutorial API controllers: MatchController (/matches/) for listing/viewing matches; TutorialController (/matches/tutorial/) for starting/cleaning up tutorial matches with overridden cheap costs

nodes.label: MatchController
nodes.description: API controller (/matches/) with list_my_matches, list_player_matches, get_match. Excludes tutorial matches. Module-gated by 'matchmaking'.

nodes.label: TutorialController
nodes.description: API controller (/matches/tutorial/) for tutorial match lifecycle. start_tutorial creates a match with cheap building/unit costs, assigns TutorialBot, sets status to SELECTING. cleanup_tutorial deletes user's tutorial matches.

nodes.label: matchmaking/internal_api.py
nodes.description: Internal API for Rust gateway. Endpoints: queue add/remove/count, try_match (creates Match with full settings snapshot), fill_with_bots, active-match lookup, lobby CRUD (create/join/leave/ready/start/kick/invite), get_game_config. Also: _consume_default_deck and _build_cosmetic_snapshot helpers.

nodes.label: MatchmakingInternalController
nodes.description: Internal API controller (/internal/matchmaking/) secured by X-Internal-Secret. Handles queue management, match creation with full game config snapshots, bot filling, lobby operations, and active match lookup.

nodes.label: _consume_default_deck
nodes.description: Consumes items from user's default deck at match start. Non-consumables verified but not removed; consumables removed from inventory and deck. Returns snapshot with unlocked_buildings, building_levels, unlocked_units, ability_scrolls, active_boosts, instance_ids.

nodes.label: _build_cosmetic_snapshot
nodes.description: Builds cosmetic snapshot for match. Static skins stored as {slot: url}, VFX slots as {slot: {url, params, instance_id}}. Frozen at match start.

nodes.label: matchmaking/schemas.py
nodes.description: Pydantic schemas: MatchPlayerOutSchema (with username/is_banned resolvers), MatchOutSchema, MatchQueueOutSchema

nodes.label: matchmaking/tasks.py
nodes.description: Celery task cleanup_stale_lobbies: kicks unready players from full lobbies past 2min timeout, cancels stale waiting lobbies (>10min), cancels empty lobbies. Publishes events to Redis for gateway notification.

nodes.label: matchmaking/events.py
nodes.description: Publishes lobby events to Redis pub/sub channel 'lobby:events' for the Rust gateway to consume and broadcast via WebSocket

nodes.label: publish_lobby_event
nodes.description: Publishes JSON event to 'lobby:events' Redis channel. Used for lobby state changes (players_kicked, lobby_cancelled, etc.).

nodes.label: matchmaking/admin.py
nodes.description: Django admin for Match (with cancel action via Redis), MatchPlayer, MatchQueue, Lobby, LobbyPlayer. Uses Unfold-based admin with status display labels.

nodes.label: notifications/models.py
nodes.description: Notification model with types: friend_request_received/accepted, match_won/lost, player_eliminated, game_invite. Tracks user, title, body, data JSON, is_read flag.

nodes.label: Notification
nodes.description: Notification model with type choices, title, body, JSON data, is_read flag. Indexed on (user, is_read, -created_at).

nodes.label: notifications/publisher.py
nodes.description: Publishes social events to Redis 'social:events' channel for Rust gateway to forward to user WebSocket connections

nodes.label: publish_social_event
nodes.description: Publishes JSON event (type, user_id, payload) to 'social:events' Redis channel. Gateway subscribes and forwards to user's WebSocket.

nodes.label: notifications/services.py
nodes.description: Notification service functions: create_notification (DB + real-time via Redis), notify_friend_request_received/accepted, notify_match_result, notify_player_eliminated, notify_game_invite. Polish-language notification titles.

nodes.label: create_notification
nodes.description: Creates DB notification and pushes real-time via publish_social_event to Redis -> Rust gateway -> WebSocket

nodes.label: notifications/views.py
nodes.description: Notification API controller (/notifications/) with list, unread_count, mark_read, mark_all_read endpoints. JWT auth required.

nodes.label: NotificationController
nodes.description: API controller for notification CRUD. Endpoints: list (paginated), unread_count, mark_read (single), mark_all_read.

nodes.label: notifications/schemas.py
nodes.description: Pydantic schema: NotificationOutSchema (id, type, title, body, data, is_read, created_at)

edges.label: creates Region records with PostGIS ST_Touches neighbors
creates Region records from game province data
